name: FormFish
short_description: FormFish is a little tetris-like game. Try to catch the incoming shapes with the traps of the right color and the right trap !
detailed_description:
Update Notes

Version 1.0.2.0 Update Now available ! - The initial speed of the game has been lowered. And increase of speed during game is more visible now. - A score display error has been corrected for games reaching more than 100000 points.


About the Game

FormFish is a casual game. You must stay alert when forms arrive and try to catch them with the right "trap"... before they cover all the screen. But take care ! The most forms you catch ... faster they will come !! Catch several shapes in a row and you will get combos !
about_the_game:
FormFish is a casual game. You must stay alert when forms arrive and try to catch them with the right "trap"... before they cover all the screen. But take care ! The most forms you catch ... faster they will come !!
Catch several shapes in a row and you will get combos !
